description: DutchX exchange proxy (dx_2). Three claim layers — L1 direct WETH/SAI balances (withdraw only), L2 unclaimed auction positions (claimBuyerFunds/claimSellerFunds + withdraw), L3 partially-claimed positions (same two-step flow). Positions use compressed fields: t=type(buyer/seller), st=sellToken, bt=buyToken, ai=auctionIndex, w=claimable_weth. Unattributable gap: ~6.3 ETH.
